treatment_information.dosage_or_details: Excision following the cleavage planes identified by MRI
treatment_information.treatment_response: Good outcome without related symptoms, no recurrence observed

treatment_information.dosage_or_details: Performed to stabilize the wrist after excision of the mass

treatment_timeline.event: Excision of the mass involving the posterior distal epiphysis of the radius
Ligamentoplasty performed to stabilize the wrist
Excision of the mass involving the distal medial part of the femoral epiphysis
Development of calcification outside the area of total excision in femoral lesion case
Spontaneous nervous recovery in patient with lateral involvement of the proximal tibial epiphysis

patient_outcome.final_status: Good outcome without related symptoms, all returned to normal activities
patient_outcome.complications: One patient developed calcification outside the area of total excision; another had a postoperative nervous complication
patient_outcome.long_term_prognosis: No epiphysiodesis, angular deformity or recurrence observed at longest follow-up
patient_outcome.quality_of_life: All patients returned to their normal activities
